name: coprod_mix_high_exp035
hypothesis: Is the FROZEN DENSE q the format shortcut? exp033 found actual query (cos 0.10) mismatches stored key (cos 0.35). The query is 50% frozen-dense + 50% trainable-coproduct (sigmoid(0)=0.5). Force coproduct-dominated (coprod_mix_qk init 5.0, sigmoid=0.993 -> 99.3% coproduct, 0.7% dense) so the TRAINABLE coproduct fully controls q/k. If recall>0 -> the frozen dense q was the format shortcut, the coproduct CAN align -> EDITABLE BREAKTHROUGH. If 0.28/0.0 -> CE drives even coproduct-only query to format -> CE-only loss is the ceiling regardless of query source. Value mix stays at 0 (dense value encoding intact, exp033 showed value stored correctly). exp012 only nudged mix to 0.1; this is the extreme case (5.0).
